mapper.select: select last_reindex_at as lastReindexAt, last_reindex_indexed as lastReindexIndexed, last_reindex_deleted as lastReindexDeleted, last_reindex_failed as lastReindexFailed, last_error as lastError, last_error_at as lastErrorAt from search_index_status where id = 1
mapper.update: update search_index_status set strategy = #{strategy}, elasticsearch_enabled = #{elasticsearchEnabled}, fallback_to_db = #{fallbackToDb}, last_reindex_at = current_timestamp, last_reindex_indexed = #{indexed}, last_reindex_deleted = #{deleted}, last_reindex_failed = #{failed}, last_error = null, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = 1

update search_index_status set strategy = #{strategy}, elasticsearch_enabled = #{elasticsearchEnabled}, fallback_to_db = #{fallbackToDb}, last_error = #{message}, last_error_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = 1
